idea-plugin.name: Rename Screen
idea-plugin.description:
A growing toolkit for working with Android MVP screens in Android Studio.

Current features:
  • New Tea Screen — generates full MVP boilerplate (Fragment, Contract, Presenter, DI, layout, and optional Adapter, Mapper, Params) with a single dialog. Supports params, RecyclerView, Bottom Sheet, and Titled Toolbar variants.
  • Rename Screen (All Files) — renames all screen artifacts in one refactoring operation: Fragment, Presenter, Contract, Params, Mapper, Adapter, DI, layout file, package, and the Screens entry.

More tools may be added in future versions.

action.description: Creates MVP screen boilerplate: Fragment, Contract, Presenter, DI, layout, and optional Adapter/Mapper/Params.
Renames all artifacts of an Android screen: Fragment, Presenter, Contract, layout, etc.
